description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 파편과 글리치 아티팩트가 특징인, 질서가 디지털 혼돈으로 붕괴하는 과정을 담은 단색화 연구입니다.
description.en: A monochromatic study of order collapsing into digital chaos, featuring sharp geometric shards and glitch artifacts.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X, titled 'The Hyper-Dimensional Fragmentation.' The structure is captured mid-shatter into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 geometric shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, datamoshing textures, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical beauty of digital chaos within order.
